column1: # VicPol CAD Lineup Generator — Station Data
# Fill in one row per station. Lines starting with # are ignored.
# The header row (below) must stay exactly as written.
#   name           Station display name. Do not include "Police Station".
#   region         Single region key letter — must match one of:
#                  (Add new regions by also adding an <option> in index.html)
#   region_label   Full region name shown in the tool (e.g. "Eastern").
#   division       Division name shown in the dropdown
#                  Stations with the same division value are grouped together.
#   div_code       Short division reference code (e.g. GV
#                  Used for reference only — not shown to the user.
#   psa            Code of the Police Service Area station that covers
#                  this station (e.g. ESP). Leave blank if unknown.
#   cri            Code of the Crime Desk (CRI) that services this station.
#   classification Station size/role. Must be exactly one of:
#   • Leave a field blank rather than writing N/A or — (just leave it empty).
#   • If psa or cri reference another station
#   • classification controls how many units the tool generates by default.
#   • Stations are displayed in the order they appear in this file.
